air.name: Silver Stylus
air.description: A stylus of pale silver. Warm to the touch. It leaves no mark on stone — only on vellum prepared with breath.

air.name: Breath Pigment
air.description: A bowl of pigment that shifts between silver and pale blue. It never runs dry but only writes true words.

air.name: Unwritten Vellum
air.description: A scrap of vellum. When held to the light, faint letters appear — then vanish.

air.name: Star Lens
air.description: A lens of polished crystal. Through it, the observatory stars resolve into glyphs.

air.name: Wind Key
air.description: A small stone carved with the Zayin glyph. It hums when held near a locked door.

air.name: Breath Seal
air.description: The mark of completion. Placing this on the sanctum door opens the way out.
